mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (bookshelf_id, ISBN, user_id) VALUES (#{bookshelfId},#{ISBN}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM book WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND ISBN=#{ISBN}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book WHERE ISBN=#{ISBN} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM book WHERE bookshelf_id=#{bookshelfId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT count(ISBN) from book WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND bookshelf_id=#{bookshelfId} AND ISBN = #{ISBN}
SELECT count(*) FROM book WHERE bookshelf_id=#{bookshelfId} AND user_id=#{userId}
SELECT count(b.ISBN) FROM book b JOIN bookshelf bs ON b.bookshelf_id = bs.bookshelf_id WHERE bs.user_id = #{userId}
